message:
feat(frankenterm-core): add UTF-8, DECSET/DECRST, cursor save/restore to parser

Extend the VT/ANSI parser with three key capabilities that were
previously missing:

- UTF-8 multi-byte character parsing (2/3/4-byte sequences) with
  proper state machine handling, split-feed continuation, and invalid
  byte rejection
- DEC private mode set/reset (CSI ? Pm h/l) and ANSI mode set/reset
  (CSI Pm h/l) producing DecSet/DecRst/AnsiSet/AnsiRst actions
- ESC-level sequences: cursor save/restore (ESC 7/8), index (ESC D),
  reverse index (ESC M), next line (ESC E), full reset (ESC c)
- VT (0x0B) and FF (0x0C) now treated as newline

Update all test harnesses (differential_terminal, differential_extras_reference,
conformance_fixtures, proptest_invariants) with new Action variant handling.
Update proptest cell assertion to accept Unicode content.

Advances bd-lff4p.1.6

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
